creator: newton.ja.terry@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to daniel.engberg.lists from comment #5)
> Upstream site seems to be down (including git repo)
Yes, I noticed it too. immediate after sending mail to freebsd-ports@. I should have checked it before. Sorry. But last time I checked upstream on 2021-03-26 (comment 4) it was online. It must happend recently.

(In reply to daniel.engberg.lists from comment #6)
> ...and given that it's been reported almost 3 months ago I think we can assume
> that upstream is dead. I'd suggest that you migrate it to the GitHub repo,
> please follow the directions in Porter's Handbook on regarding GitHub.

The maintainer of the project has migrated it to GitHub.

https://github.com/lfos/calcurse.

I'll adapt the port accordingly.

Best regards,
Newton
